commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces raw Tlon approval preview truncation with `sliceUtf16Safe` in DM/channel approval creation and notification formatting, then adds regression tests for the surrogate-pair boundary case.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +61. Total +64 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main and the latest release can slice a surrogate pair at the 100-code-unit Tlon approval preview cap; the PR body also includes terminal before/after proof using the production approval functions.
